patterns_recognized: Pick-column misread was a documented failure mode on 2026-07-08 (4 of 15 games misread: CHC@BAL, ATL@PIT, NYY@TB, HOU@WSH), always in the direction of inferring the pick from full_prob/f5_prob instead of the CSV `pick` column when Stage 1 and Stage 2 disagreed across 50%. Always read `pick` directly.

Stage 2 (full-game) direction has repeatedly outperformed Stage 1 in large f5_full_delta zones (>0.15) across 2026-07-09 through 07-11 (LAA@MIN Δ=0.224 win, SEA@TB Δ=0.18-0.24 on both 07-10 and 07-11 wins, KC@NYM Δ=0.302 loss where Stage 1 was right) — evidence is mixed enough that a large Stage 1/2 delta should inform caution, not drive an OVERRIDE toward Stage 1's side.

HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket (pick_prob 0.50-0.55) suppression has noisy recent evidence: the cited archive baseline is 31.2% (non-CONFIRM) / 47.6% (CONFIRM-rescued) hit rate, both below breakeven, yet 2026-07-10 saw 3/3 CAP-10-suppressed picks win outright (PHI@DET, NYY@WSH, BOS@NYM). Treat the band as low-conviction either way — SKIP process discipline stays correct regardless of short-run outcome variance.

D-grade/C-grade picks resting on a single opposing signal (PQI or SP-xERA against, no F-signal) have split close to 50/50 directionally across 2026-07-07 through 07-11 — confirm the SKIP; do not OVERRIDE toward the opposing side on this signal profile alone.

The four-dimension CAP-10 rescue rule (F-signal + SP-xERA + PQI + Stage-1/2 agreement all affirming simultaneously at pre-cap score ≥ 5) is the only validated elevation pathway out of the bottom bucket, confirmed on CLE@MIA (2026-07-10 win). Today's NYM@PHI pre-cap score is 0 with no F-signal firing — not remotely close to qualifying.

NYM @ PHI.reasoning: NYM correctly graded SKIP: score=0 (no F-signal fires, PQI Δ=+9.3 opposing NYM, CAP 10 fires at pick_prob=0.535). Four-dimension rescue (F-signal + SP-xERA + PQI + Stage agree at pre-cap ≥ 5) is unmet. Platoon context unavailable (vs_today_SP_OPS null throughout—lineups not yet posted). BvP: Soto is a strong OWNER vs Nola (59 PA, shrunk OPS 1.000, 0.085 HR/PA); Lindor historically struggles (42 PA, shrunk 0.666). One OWNER alone does not elevate a zero-signal pick per the BvP framework. Scott's K% edge (28.7% vs Nola 24.12%) modestly corroborates NYM's Stage 2 direction; no live injury or roster information is verifiable.
lessons_applied: CAP-10 bottom-bucket suppression correct: no F-signal fires and PQI opposes NYM — four-dimension rescue threshold unmet
BvP one-OWNER rule: Soto OWNER vs Nola (59 PA, shrunk 1.000) noted but one OWNER is insufficient to elevate a zero-signal pick
Stage 2 full-game direction (NYM 55.2%) corroborated by Scott K% edge; Stage 1 lean (PHI 60% F5) does not override Stage 2 per 07-09 through 07-11 high-delta pattern
Pick-column discipline: model_pick=NYM read directly from CSV `pick` column, not inferred from f5_prob or full_prob
